[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1111111111 a
1 1111111111 a
2 1111111111 a
3 0010111110 6
4 1001111001 6
5 1100110010 5
6 1111111110 9
7 1111111101 9

01 1101101011 7

23 1111011101 8

67 1111101111 9

24 1111001111 8
35 1101111110 8
46 1110110100 6
57 1111100011 7
60 0111011111 8
71 1011111101 8

25 1111111111 a match 0 1 2

47 1110110110 7
50 1111010101 7
61 1111101111 9
72 0011111111 8
